name: ai-call-center
description: AI-based Call Quality & Compliance Auto-Scoring Platform for BPO call centers

scripts.install-all: cd backend && npm install && cd ../frontend && npm install && cd ../ai-service && python -m venv venv && .\venv\Scripts\pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ..
scripts.seed: cd backend && npm run seed && cd ..

author: Nextel BPO
